summary: SEO optimization testing for Gradačac Mapa web city guide. Backend: 31/31 tests pass (sitemap.xml, robots.txt, admin SEO settings API). Frontend: Title tag and canonical link work correctly. CRITICAL BUG found: duplicate meta tags in DOM — index.html static tags (og:title='Gradačac Mapa - Digitalni vodič', og:type='website', meta description generic) appear BEFORE react-helmet-async dynamic tags, so scrapers/crawlers use static generic values instead of article-specific SEO. Admin panel SEO tab has all required fields.

minor.issue: When site_url is not configured, sitemap falls back to internal cluster URL (http://gradacac-map.cluster-2.preview.emergentcf.cloud) instead of public URL. Admin must configure 'Kanonski URL sajta' in admin panel to fix this.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL DUPLICATE META TAGS: index.html defines static og:title, og:description, og:type and meta[name=description]. react-helmet-async ADDS dynamic tags but cannot REMOVE the static ones. DOM has 2x og:title, 2x og:type, 2x meta description. Static (generic) values come first. Social media crawlers (Facebook, Twitter, Google) parse the FIRST occurrence — they see generic site-wide title/description instead of article-specific SEO content.

VITE_CANONICAL_BASE env var not set in web-city/.env — canonical URLs are relative paths (/api/city/vijesti/...) instead of absolute URLs (https://gradacac-mapa.ba/api/city/vijesti/...). Absolute URLs are strongly preferred for SEO canonical links.

action_items: CRITICAL FIX: Remove static meta tags from /app/web-city/index.html that conflict with react-helmet-async — specifically: meta[name=description], meta[property=og:title], meta[property=og:description], meta[property=og:type]. Move default values to a root-level <Helmet> component in App.tsx so they can be overridden by SEOHead on detail pages.
MEDIUM FIX: Create /app/web-city/.env with VITE_CANONICAL_BASE=https://gradacac-mapa.ba (or the production URL) so canonical tags use absolute URLs instead of relative paths.
INFO: When site_url is empty in admin settings, sitemap.xml uses internal cluster URL. Document this requirement for users — they must set 'Kanonski URL sajta' in admin panel SEO tab.
critical_code_review_comments: index.html has static og:title, og:description, og:type, meta description — these CANNOT be replaced by react-helmet-async (only managed tags can be removed). This defeats the purpose of the dynamic SEO implementation. Fix: Remove from index.html, add as default Helmet in App.tsx.
SEOHead.tsx: SITE_BASE = import.meta.env.VITE_CANONICAL_BASE || '' — canonical URLs are relative when VITE_CANONICAL_BASE is not set. This is a missing env configuration.
sitemap.xml: base_url fallback to request.base_url returns internal cluster URL in production environment. Should provide a warning/default or document that site_url must be configured.

success_rate.frontend: 60% — title (PASS), canonical (PASS), JSON-LD NewsArticle (PASS), og:title (PARTIAL - duplicated, first is generic), meta description (PARTIAL - duplicated, first is generic), og:type (PARTIAL - duplicated, first is 'website' not 'article'), admin panel SEO tab fields (PASS)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. Test SEO settings (google_verification, google_analytics_id) were set and cleaned up during test_seo_features.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO features are partially working. Backend is 100% working. Key bug: index.html has static meta tags that override/duplicate dynamic react-helmet-async tags. Fix is to remove static og: and meta description tags from index.html and move them into a root Helmet component. Admin panel SEO tab confirmed working with all 3 required fields: Google SC verifikacijski kod, Google Analytics 4 ID, Kanonski URL sajta.

rca_of_issue.bug: Duplicate meta tags - static index.html tags win over dynamic SEOHead tags
rca_of_issue.reproduction: Navigate to /api/city/vijesti/e4c0a139-b14b-4411-bb4a-7b1021385d6f, inspect <head>. Find 2x og:title, 2x meta[description], 2x og:type. First occurrence is generic from index.html.
rca_of_issue.root_cause: react-helmet-async manages only the tags it inserts. Static tags in index.html are not tracked by Helmet and cannot be removed/updated. When Helmet adds new og:title etc., both exist in DOM simultaneously. Crawlers parse first occurrence.
rca_of_issue.fix: Remove from index.html: meta[name=description], meta[property=og:title], meta[property=og:description], meta[property=og:type]. Add <Helmet><meta name='description' content='...' /><meta property='og:title' content='...' /></Helmet> in App.tsx root component as defaults.
